query: vintage photograph with light leak streaks across edge film burn artifact lo-fi
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: light leak — film burn streaks, analog defects, motion-blur light trails, lo-fi authenticity

response.objective_caption: Raised block letters spelling part of a word emerge from a dark, reflective surface partially obscured by a thick, cloudy white layer resembling condensation, steam, or frost. Tiny droplets and irregular streaks texture the surface. The upper portion is dominated by bright white that gradually shifts to darker purple-brown tones toward the bottom of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Raised block letters spelling part of a word on a dark surface are partially obscured by a cloudy white layer of condensation or steam, rendered with intentional soft blur and smeared textures that lack fine detail. Muted, faded tones and a sickly purple-brown cast blanket the frame under flat, oppressive lighting with crushed contrast, while the abstract subject matter and stained, deteriorating surface evoke atmospheric distress and decay.
